markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into SentinelOne's content strategy, quality control processes, and key stakeholders for blog and thought leadership content.](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SentinelOne focuses on two primary audiences for blog content: customers/prospects and the broader security community](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Quality control process involves an abstract review system and a cross-functional Content Council, though improvements are needed](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Key stakeholders for content strategy include Craig VerColen, Drew Wright, Tim Mackey, and Brian Gale](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Maintaining credibility and avoiding overly promotional content is crucial for the highly technical and skeptical cybersecurity audience](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Audience Focus

  - [Blog content targets two main audiences:](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Customers and prospects (from hands-on practitioners to CISOs/CIOs)](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [Broader security community (peers, partners, influencers, analysts)](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Shifted away from using blog as a "company junk drawer" for unrelated content (e.g., talent brand, venture arm updates)](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Audience is highly technical, skeptical, and averse to promotional content](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Credibility and providing actionable information (e.g., IOCs) are prioritized over direct product promotion](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

### Content Contributors and Types

  - [Sentinel Labs team: Novel threat research, "From the Front Lines" analysis](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Product Marketing: Product launches, features, market-related thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Technical Marketing and Evangelism: In-depth technical content for practitioners](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Ad hoc contributions from other teams (e.g., detections engineering)](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)

### Quality Control Process

  - [Abstract review system:](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [Contributors submit \~100-word abstract before writing full post](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [Responses categorized as Yes, No, or Yes-but with guidance](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Content Council:](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [Cross-functional editorial board for idea sharing and coordination](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [Current setup is overly democratized; needs streamlining](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Craig VerColen reviews all blog content, focusing on:](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [Messaging consistency](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [Alignment with executive priorities](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
      - [Avoiding implications of product weaknesses](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

### Areas for Improvement

  - [Develop comprehensive messaging guides for products and features](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Streamline Content Council process and clarify stakeholder roles](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Improve coordination with Product Marketing for consistent messaging](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Establish clearer guidelines for Cyber 101 content to maintain quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

### Key Stakeholders

  - [Craig VerColen: Communications and corporate oversight](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Drew Wright: SEO and digital marketing](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Tim Mackey and Brian Gale: Product Marketing leadership](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Adam Hall: Technical Marketing and Evangelism lead](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [Joshua (new hire): Brand and style guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [Allie: Demand generation with PR and PMM experience](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule deep dive meeting with Tim Mackey for product marketing insights](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [Await additional documentation on messaging guidelines from Craig](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Implement streamlined content creation process incorporating stakeholder expertise](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Develop calibration article for team review to establish quality benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Continue coordination on vulnerability database project](https://fathom.video/share/8r7BKQ7bwHnH5Cq1K1zQAF9QtqbzekKd?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)
